rules.rule_text:
title: Dropbox hosted file download
id: 97c14fc0-ea20-4ef3-b740-0a4624276806
description: Dropbox is a filehosting service used to host files which can have a
  malicious purpose
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2022-08-08'
references:
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/cloaked-ursa-online-storage-services-campaigns/
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    cs-host:
    - www.dropbox.com
    - dl.dropbox.com
    url|endswith:
    - dl=1
  filter:
  - c-uri|endswith:
    - .css
    - .jpg
    - .png
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Legitimate file downloads
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial_access
